_doc: EXAMPLE ONLY — copy entries into seed.json after verifying each quote against its source_url. NEVER fabricate a press quote: a featured_review is text ATTRIBUTED to a third party (Forbes Travel Guide, Conde Nast Traveler, Travel + Leisure, Michelin Guide, ...). Every entry MUST carry a real https source_url. Provide quote_fr and/or quote_en (verbatim or a faithful translation of the published quote), and optionally rating + max_rating (5-point or 100-point scale) and date_iso (YYYY-MM-DD). Run: pnpm exec tsx src/hotels/seed-featured-reviews.ts --dry-run

reviews.quote_fr: << Quote verbatim ou traduction fidele du texte publie a l'URL ci-dessus. >>
reviews.quote_en: << Verbatim quote or faithful translation of the text published at the URL above. >>
